content.en:
"What's in the circle?"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

Yan Yan's controller introduced: "Senior Brother Ye, there is a world in the magic circle, and there is a black tree growing in this world, this black tree can slowly improve our will, and every ten million realm river years, a black fruit will be born, after swallowing this black fruit, it can temporarily improve our understanding a lot, so we have been staying in the circle world to practice, and we are not in a hurry to go out, but for Senior Brother Ye, this black tree is not of much value." "

"Didn't you think about moving this black tree?"

Ye Tian asked.

The half-tooth master said: "We tried, but we couldn't move it, we couldn't take away any items in that world, this is the limit of the magic circle, unless we can break the magic circle, we can hope to take away the black tree." In addition, there are many living beings in the circle world, and these creatures think that this world is the only world, but in fact it is just a world built by the formation. "

"Let's go inside. "

Ye Tiandao.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian and the Half-Tooth Controller and Yan Yan Controller entered this magic circle world.

......

Black Tree World.

When Ye Tian and the others came here, they immediately felt the suppression of themselves by this magic circle world.

At this time.

Yan Yan Controller and Half Tooth Controller can't get out by normal means, unless they use the secret treasure to go out, but they don't have many secret treasures like that, and they keep them as life-saving hole cards, so they won't be used easily.

"Senior Brother Ye, we can't get out now, and we can't break the formation here, so we can only rely on you, Senior Brother. The half-tooth master said.

"Let me spy on the rules of this circle world, basically similar to this circle world, the rules here should be created by the master himself, so you must understand the situation of this circle world before you can know the rules of this world. Two junior disciples, you should have the cultivation system of this world, show me. "

Ye Tian said.

"Yes. "

Yan Yan and Half Tooth Masters immediately gave Ye Tian a bunch of cultivation techniques.

Ye Tian looked at it, studied it again, and then comprehended the rules of this magic circle world, and gradually had some understanding.

"Interesting, it's not difficult to break through this formation world, but I need about ten thousand realm river years. Ye Tian said with a sigh of relief.

"Ten thousand world river years, so fast!"

Yan Yan Controller and Half Tooth Controller were extremely surprised, this speed was too fast, the two of them had worked together to comprehend hundreds of billions of realm river years, and there was no way to break through this formation world!

This comparison is too shocking!

Time passed slowly, and before I knew it, ten thousand river years had passed.

this day.

Ye Tian said to Yan Yan's master and the half-tooth master: "Two junior brothers, I have already gained insight into the rules of this world, and I can break through this formation world and leave. Plus, I have a way to take that black tree. How about the black tree for me?"

"Senior Brother Ye, that black tree is useless to us, Senior Brother can take it if he wants. Yan Yan Controller and Half Tooth Controller immediately said.

They don't need that black tree, if they can break through this formation world, they can go deep into this cave blessed land, and maybe they can find a better opportunity to improve their strength.

Ye Tian wanted that black tree, naturally not for himself.

This black tree is of great value, and it is an incomparably precious treasure for the average eternal master, and he is ready to bring it into the void area and leave it to the human race as the town clan god tree.

In this way, the human race will cultivate many strong men and geniuses, and the number of eternal controllers born in the future may be much higher.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the black tree.

At this time, there are a large number of Black Tree World powerhouses here to comprehend, among which there are two half-step Eternal Masters here, and the others are peak Legendary Realm Lords.

That's when it happened.

Ye Tian imitated the rules of this world and made a move.

Bang!!!!

A pair of big black hands grabbed the black tree, and the huge black tree was uprooted.

Immediately, Ye Tian was about to take the black tree and leave.

The rules of the Black Tree World wanted to suppress Ye Tian, but Ye Tian had already understood the rules of this world, and easily smashed the rules of the world, leaving with the Yanyan Controller and the Half Tooth Controller.

"No, our sacred tree!"

Countless creatures in the Black Tree World cried and shouted, but Ye Tian couldn't hear it.

......

As soon as he left the Black Tree World, Ye Tian and Yan Yan's Controller, and the Half-Tooth Controller fell into a killing array.

Thundered!!!!

One by one, the black thunder dragons were killed, and the power of each thunder dragon was comparable to the full force of the Nine Domains-level controllers, and the Yanyan controllers and half-tooth controllers were all trembling, and they couldn't resist at all.

At this time, Ye Tian waved his hand, and one by one the thunder dragons shattered.

This circle is a pure attack circle, so the change of the circle is simple, as long as you resist the attack of the killing array, you can quickly find out the many changes of the circle, so as to tear a passage and leave.

Yan Yan Controller and Half Tooth Controller didn't dare to move, so Ye Tian could only protect them and resist these thunder dragon attacks.

"Fortunately, we found Senior Brother Ye, otherwise even if the two of us were lucky enough to break through the magic circle of the Black Tree World, once we entered here, we would have fallen in an instant. The half-tooth master sighed.

"Yes, it's still Senior Brother Ye who is amazing!"

Yan Yan's controller nodded.

Time passed slowly, and after a long time, Ye Tian finally had insight into the many changes in this killing array.

"Open!"

Ye Tian shattered a corner of the killing array with one blow, tore out a crack, pulled Yan Yan's controller and the half-tooth master, and rushed out of the killing array.

At this time, they fell into another killing formation.

I have to say that the owner here doesn't like people to disturb him very much, so he arranges one formation after another.

However, since there was no one to preside over the killing array, the power of the killing array was not very strong, if the master was still there, Ye Tian would not be able to stop the killing array here.

Under Ye Tian's invasion, the killing arrays were broken through by him one after another.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian took the Yanyan Controller and the Half-Tooth Controller through many killing formations and came to an extremely majestic and simple hall.

And here, there is a black sculpture placed here.

Seeing this sculpture, the Yan Yan Controller and the Half Tooth Controller screamed in unison.

"Black Ancestor's Ten Thousand Phases Statue!"

They were shocked that there was a statue of ten thousand faces here, which was completely beyond their expectations, and they were immediately excited.
